codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3010'
path = '/auth/connection-tokens'
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.post(
    url,
    headers={
        'Authorization': 'Bearer 288adad9312ec64eff74b5bb706b29916ee70d053366d1def53f90cf74ff55cc'
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)

  💭 Close socket

codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3010'
path = '/auth/pair'
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.post(
    url,
    json={
      "code": "JEWWK7",
      "worldId": "test-world-integration",
      "worldTitle": "Test World"
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)
